scored_hypotheses.claim: The text is encoded using a simple substitution cipher on an unknown language.

test_result.test: claude_evaluation
test_result.details: The Zipf exponent (0.8946) supports natural language structure, but the high glyph entropy (3.8627/4.64 max) and exceptionally high hapax ratio (0.701) contradict a simple substitution cipher, indicating artificial or heavily obfuscated text rather than an unknown language with linguistic constraints.

scored_hypotheses.claim: The manuscript's text structure reflects a single, coherent narrative.

test_result.test: claude_evaluation
test_result.details: High hapax ratio (0.701) contradicts coherent narrative; single-coherent texts show repeated key concepts and lower vocabulary diversity than evidenced here.
